classes.name: ScreenerError
classes.docstring: Base class for all screener errors.

classes.name: ScreenerNotFoundError
classes.docstring: Raised when a screener_id is not registered in ScreenerRegistry.

classes.name: ScreenerValidationError
classes.docstring: Raised when a screener configuration fails validation.

classes.name: PresetError
classes.docstring: Base class for preset-related errors.

classes.name: PresetValidationError
classes.docstring: Raised when a Preset fails structural validation.

classes.name: PresetAccessDenied
classes.docstring: Raised when a user accesses a preset they do not own or share.

classes.name: PresetNotFoundError
classes.docstring: Raised when a preset cannot be found on disk.

classes.name: ScreenerExecutionError
classes.docstring: Raised when preset execution fails (non-validation error).

classes.name: PreFilterError
classes.docstring: Raised when the pre-filter stage encounters an unrecoverable error.

classes.name: Screener
classes.docstring: Protocol that all screener plugins must satisfy.

methods.name: apply
methods.docstring: Screen symbols.

methods.name: batch_features
methods.docstring: Extract features for LLM ranking (no external API calls).

classes.name: PresetExecutor
classes.docstring: Orchestrates the 3-stage screening pipeline for a single preset run.

def __init__(

        max_workers: int = 4,
    ) -> None

methods.name: run_preset
methods.signature:
def run_preset(
        self,
        preset_id: str,
        user_id: str,
        manual: bool = True,
        *,
        symbols: list[str] | None = None,
        bars: dict[str, list[Any]] | None = None,
        preset: Preset | None = None,
    ) -> ScreenerRunResult
methods.docstring: Execute a preset and persist the result.

methods.name: _run_stage2
methods.docstring: Call every enabled screener and collect per-symbol (passed, score).

methods.name: _combine_results
_composite_logic
methods.docstring: Symbol passes if ANY group passes (groups are OR-ed together).

methods.name: _weighted_logic
methods.docstring: Score = Σ(score_i × weight_i) / Σ(weights) for enabled screeners.

methods.name: _run_stage3
methods.docstring: Re-rank Stage 2 passing symbols with CloudAIScreener.
